before: public int Calc(List<int> lst){ int x=0; foreach(var i in lst){ x+=i; } return x; }
after: public int Calc(List<int> numbers){ int total = 0; foreach (var number in numbers) { total += number; } return total; }
why_safe: Only local variable and parameter names changed; logic and return value identical.

before: private bool Chk(User u){ return u!=null && u.IsActive && !u.IsBlocked; }
after: private bool CanUserProceed(User user){ return user != null && user.IsActive && !user.IsBlocked; }
why_safe: Private method and parameter renamed for clarity; boolean expression unchanged.
